m_Item1.QuestionText: What is the default alignment of the data in an HTML table cell?
m_Item1.Explanation: Data in table cell will be by default left aligned.

m_Item1.QuestionText: What is the correct nesting order for table elements?
m_Item1.Explanation: Tables are structured with rows (<tr>) containing cells (<td> or <th>).

m_Item1.QuestionText: Which tag is used to create a numbered list?
m_Item1.Explanation: The <ol> tag stands for ordered list, which creates a numbered list.

m_Item1.QuestionText: Which tag is used to specify a term that should be described in detail with the <dl> element?
m_Item1.Explanation: <dt> is used to specify a term in a description list (<dl>).

m_Item1.QuestionText: For Frames in HTML, how do you specify that frame should occupy  the rest of the screen?
m_Item1.Explanation: To specify that frame should occupy rest of screen use *.

m_Item1.QuestionText:
What is the output of following?
<html>
<frameset cols='*,*'>
    <frame src=''>
    <frame src=''>
</frameset>
</html>

Options.OptionText: Two frame columns appear in browser window.
Two frame rows appear in browser window.
No frames appear in browser window.

m_Item1.Explanation: Two frame columns displays on browser.

m_Item1.QuestionText: Which of the following is an attribute of <Table> tag?
m_Item1.Explanation: <table cellpadding="2"> specified the space between cell content and cell wall.

m_Item1.QuestionText: Is it possible to insert a table within another table?

Options.OptionText: Yes, but there must be exactly 2 rows and 2 columns in first table.
Yes, table can be inserted into cell of another table
Yes, but there must be no border in inserted table.

m_Item1.Explanation: Yes , we can insert table into cell of another table.

m_Item1.QuestionText: What is cell padding?

Options.OptionText: Used to separate cell walls from their contents.
Used to set space between cells
Used to provide width to a cell

m_Item1.Explanation: To set space between cell content and cell wall cell padding is used.

m_Item1.QuestionText: Which attribute FRAMESET tag does not have amongst the following?.
m_Item1.Explanation: Frameset tag can have following attributes : cols to specify no. of column , rows : no. of rows and border of frames.

m_Item1.QuestionText: The SCROLLING attribute within the <FRAME> tag can take values ______________.
m_Item1.Explanation: <frame scrolling="Yes/No/Auto"></frame>

m_Item1.QuestionText: What is the use of iframe in HTML?

Options.OptionText: to display a web page within a web page.
to display a web page with animation effect.
to display a web page without browser.

m_Item1.Explanation: Iframes are used to display a web pages within a web page.

m_Item1.QuestionText: Which of the following are table tags?
m_Item1.Explanation: Table has different tags such as table, thead, tr, td, etc whereas colospan is an attribute of table.

m_Item1.QuestionText: What bullet options are available when making bulleted lists ?
m_Item1.Explanation: for list we have dics,circle and square options e.g <ul type="circle"></ul>

m_Item1.QuestionText: The SRC attribute of______ specifies the URL of a HTML file to be displayed in a Frame
m_Item1.Explanation: Src of iframe decided the HTML page to be displayed in the respective frame.

m_Item1.QuestionText: How can you make a list that lists the items with bullets?
m_Item1.Explanation: ul tag displays the list elements in bullets.

m_Item1.QuestionText: It is used to display data in center and bold in table tag
m_Item1.Explanation: <th> tag is used to give the heading to the column which displays data in bold and centrally aligned.

m_Item1.QuestionText: <DT> tag is designed to fit a single line of our web page but <DD> tag will accept a
m_Item1.Explanation: <dd> tag is used for specifying the definitions of a particular term which may have description in the paragraph but definition term i.e. <dt> tag can have single line of text.

m_Item1.QuestionText: From which tag descriptive list starts ?
m_Item1.Explanation: <dl> tag is used to create descriptive list

m_Item1.QuestionText: Which of these tags are all <table> tags?
m_Item1.Explanation: table, tr, td are the basic tags used for table creation.

m_Item1.QuestionText: How can you make a table cell stretch over 2 column
m_Item1.Explanation: Default value for colspan is 1. If a table cell is to be stretched across 2 columns, we need to use colspan=2

m_Item1.QuestionText: How can you open a link in a new browser window?
m_Item1.Explanation: target attribute is used to specify about where to open the link. Correct values for target are _blank, _ top, _parent.

m_Item1.QuestionText: Which HTML tag is used to create an unordered list?
m_Item1.Explanation: The <ul> tag is used to create an unordered list with bullet points in HTML.

m_Item1.QuestionText: What attribute of the <li> tag can be used in an ordered list to specify the value to be considered when the list item is selected?
m_Item1.Explanation: The 'value' attribute of an <li> tag specifies the numeric value of a list item in an ordered list.

m_Item1.QuestionText: Which attribute is used with the <ol> tag to change the starting number of an ordered list?
m_Item1.Explanation: The 'start' attribute specifies the starting value for the list items in an ordered list.

m_Item1.QuestionText: In an ordered list, what is the default type of numbering?
m_Item1.Explanation: The default type for an ordered list in HTML is numeric (1, 2, 3...).

m_Item1.QuestionText: Which attribute can be used with the <ul> tag to change the type of bullet points?
m_Item1.Explanation: The 'type' attribute is used with the <ul> tag to specify the kind of bullet points (disc, circle, square).

m_Item1.QuestionText: What HTML tag is used to represent each item in a list, regardless of whether the list is ordered or unordered?
m_Item1.Explanation: Each item in a list, whether ordered or unordered, is represented by the <li> tag.

m_Item1.QuestionText: What is the correct way to create a list item in an HTML ordered list?
m_Item1.Explanation: Use the <li> tag within <ol> to create a list item in an ordered list.

m_Item1.QuestionText: Which of the following types does the 'type' attribute of an <ol> tag support?
m_Item1.Explanation: The 'type' attribute for <ol> supports types like '1', 'A', 'a', 'I', 'i'. Here, 'A' represents uppercase letters.

m_Item1.QuestionText: In HTML5, which HTML attribute has been deprecated for lists, and the alternative method is using CSS?
m_Item1.Explanation: The 'compact' attribute is deprecated in HTML5 and similar styling should be done using CSS.

m_Item1.QuestionText: In an ordered list, which 'type' value would style list items as uppercase Roman numerals?
m_Item1.Explanation: To style list items as uppercase Roman numerals, we use the 'type' value 'I'.

m_Item1.QuestionText: How can you nest a list within another list in HTML?

Options.OptionText: By closing the existing list and starting a new list
By placing a new <ul> or <ol> tag inside a <li> tag

m_Item1.Explanation: Nesting a new <ul> or <ol> tag inside an <li> tag allows the creation of a nested list.

m_Item1.QuestionText: Which HTML tag represents a list of terms and descriptions?
m_Item1.Explanation: The <dl> tag is used for creating a description list, which can contain terms and their descriptions.

m_Item1.QuestionText: Which tags are used within the <dl> tag to define terms and their descriptions?
m_Item1.Explanation: The <dt> tag defines a term, and the <dd> tag defines a description in a description list.

m_Item1.QuestionText: Which value of the 'type' attribute in an <ol> element would produce lowercase letters for list items?
m_Item1.Explanation: The 'type' attribute with value 'a' will display list items in lowercase letters.

m_Item1.QuestionText: What is the default bullet style for items in an unordered list?
m_Item1.Explanation: The default bullet style for items in an unordered list is 'disc'.

m_Item1.QuestionText: How do you specify a custom image as a bullet for an unordered list?
m_Item1.Explanation: The 'list-style-image' property in CSS allows specifying a custom image as a bullet for an unordered list.

m_Item1.QuestionText: Which of the following is an incorrect combination of lists in HTML?
m_Item1.Explanation: <li> is not used within a <dl> tag; <dt> and <dd> should be used instead.

m_Item1.QuestionText: What is the correct tag for defining a table row?
m_Item1.Explanation: The <tr> tag is used to define a row in an HTML table.

m_Item1.QuestionText: Which HTML tag is used for specifying table headers?
m_Item1.Explanation: The <th> tag defines a header cell in an HTML table.

m_Item1.QuestionText: Can the <ul> element be used inside a <table> element?

Options.OptionText: Yes, <ul> can be used inside a <table>

m_Item1.Explanation: <ul> can be used inside a <table> only within a <td> or <th> element.

m_Item1.QuestionText: Which CSS property would you use to remove the default number or bullet style from a list?
m_Item1.Explanation: The 'list-style-type' property set to 'none' will remove numbers/bullets from a list.

m_Item1.QuestionText: What is the primary purpose of the <table> tag in HTML?
m_Item1.Explanation: The <table> tag is used in HTML for defining a table layout on a webpage.

m_Item1.QuestionText: Which tag is used for specifying a table row in an HTML table?
m_Item1.Explanation: The <tr> tag is used to define a row in an HTML table.

m_Item1.QuestionText: How do you define a header cell in an HTML table?
m_Item1.Explanation: The <th> tag is used to define a header cell in an HTML table.

m_Item1.QuestionText: Which attribute is used to merge two or more table cells horizontally?
m_Item1.Explanation: The colspan attribute specifies the number of columns a cell should span horizontally.

m_Item1.QuestionText: What does the <tfoot> tag represent in an HTML table?
m_Item1.Explanation: The <tfoot> tag is used to group the footer content in an HTML table.

m_Item1.QuestionText: Which is NOT a valid attribute of the <table> tag?
m_Item1.Explanation: The 'align' attribute is not valid in HTML5 for the <table> tag; CSS is used for alignment.

m_Item1.QuestionText: How do you specify the width of a table in HTML?
m_Item1.Explanation: The width attribute can be used to specify the width of a table, although CSS is preferred.

m_Item1.QuestionText: Which tag is used to group the body content in an HTML table?
m_Item1.Explanation: The <tbody> tag is used to group the body content in an HTML table.

m_Item1.QuestionText: What is the default alignment of the data in an HTML table header cell?
m_Item1.Explanation: By default, the text in a <th> element is center-aligned.

m_Item1.QuestionText: Which HTML element is used to define a cell in a table?
m_Item1.Explanation: The <td> tag is used to define a standard data cell in an HTML table.

m_Item1.QuestionText: What attribute is used to add space inside a table cell?
m_Item1.Explanation: The cellpadding attribute is used to specify the space between the cell content and its border.

m_Item1.QuestionText: Which attribute is used to merge two or more table cells vertically?
m_Item1.Explanation: The rowspan attribute specifies the number of rows a cell should span vertically.

m_Item1.QuestionText: Which tag is used to specify a table caption?
m_Item1.Explanation: The <caption> tag is used in HTML to define a title or caption for a table.

m_Item1.QuestionText: Which CSS property would you use to set the spacing between table cells?
m_Item1.Explanation: The border-spacing CSS property is used to set the distance between the borders of adjacent table cells.

m_Item1.QuestionText: How can you add a border around an HTML table?
m_Item1.Explanation: You can add a border around a table by using the border attribute, though CSS is recommended.

m_Item1.QuestionText: Which HTML tag defines the main body of an HTML document?
m_Item1.Explanation: The <body> tag defines the main content area of an HTML document.

m_Item1.QuestionText: Where is the <thead> tag used in an HTML document?
m_Item1.Explanation: The <thead> tag is used within the <table> element, generally placed inside the <body> section of an HTML document.

m_Item1.QuestionText: What will happen if you omit </tr> in an HTML table?

Options.OptionText: The table will not be displayed
The table cell will close automatically
A new row is created automatically

m_Item1.Explanation: Browsers are forgiving with missing end tags in tables, so they'll render correctly by predicting the intended structure.

m_Item1.QuestionText: In HTML5, what is the recommended way to specify the borders for a table?
m_Item1.Explanation: In HTML5, it is recommended to use CSS to style tables, including setting border properties.

m_Item1.QuestionText: Which tag is used to define a group of columns in an HTML table?
m_Item1.Explanation: The <colgroup> element is used to specify a group of one or more columns in an HTML table for styling.
